---
name: kratos-advanced-elicitation
description: Run the KRATOS advanced-elicitation workflow for deep requirements elicitation using structured questioning techniques.
argument-hint: Provide context about the project or requirements area to explore.
agent: kratos-orchestrator
---

Execute the KRATOS advanced-elicitation workflow directly in GitHub Copilot.

- Load the workflow engine in [workflow.xml](../../_kratos/core/engine/workflow.xml).
- Then inspect [advanced-elicitation/workflow.yaml](../../_kratos/lifecycle/workflows/1-analysis/advanced-elicitation/workflow.yaml) and its referenced instructions.
- Read any existing brainstorm or research artifacts under [../../docs/planning-artifacts](../../docs/planning-artifacts).
- Respect checkpoints and quality gates defined by KRATOS.
- Use structured questioning techniques to elicit deep requirements.
